# clean-docs documentation

> Canonical product documentation with source-bound facts and content digests.

## Source-bound documentation

- [README.md](README.md): bindings: manifest-reference, product-overview, supported-bindings; sha256: 0d2a37678adcb8a74c59a2f491bc797517bc0e78cd8913ce71c2ce1abe5f7579
